allow: PowerShell(python -c "import pandas as pd; g=pd.read_csv\('data/Games.csv',usecols=['gameId','gameDate','gameType','hometeamId','awayteamId'],low_memory=False\); g=g[g['gameType']=='Regular Season'].copy\(\); g['gameDate']=pd.to_datetime\(g['gameDate']\); g['season']=g['gameDate'].dt.year.where\(g['gameDate'].dt.month>=7,g['gameDate'].dt.year-1\); sub=g[\(g['season']==2007\)&\(\(g['hometeamId']==1610612739\)|\(g['awayteamId']==1610612739\)\)]; print\('Cle 2007-08 RS games:',len\(sub\)\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import pandas as pd; ps=pd.read_csv\('data/PlayerStatistics.csv',usecols=['firstName','lastName','personId','gameId','gameType','numMinutes','comment','gameDate'],low_memory=False\); ps['gameDate']=pd.to_datetime\(ps['gameDate']\); kyrie=ps[\(ps['firstName']=='Kyrie'\)&\(ps['lastName']=='Irving'\)]; k25=kyrie[\(kyrie['gameDate']>='2025-07-01'\)]; print\('Kyrie 2025-26 rows:',len\(k25\)\); print\(k25['comment'].value_counts\(\).head\(\)\); print\('---'\); klay=ps[\(ps['firstName']=='Klay'\)&\(ps['lastName']=='Thompson'\)]; k1920=klay[\(klay['gameDate']>='2019-07-01'\)&\(klay['gameDate']<'2021-07-01'\)]; print\('Klay 2019-21 rows:',len\(k1920\)\); print\(k1920['comment'].value_counts\(\).head\(\)\)")
